original_image_tags: A scanned document page, likely the back of a teletype or memo. The page is pinkish/aged paper with two hole-punch marks at the top. There is a prominent blue ink stamp at the top center.

elements.description: The page is the back of a document, showing bleed-through of typed text from the front and two distinct ink stamps. One stamp at the top center reads 'RECEIVED FBI COMMUNICATIONS MAY 12 9 05 PM '52'. Another stamp on the right side reads 'REC'D BELMONT F.B.I. JUSTICE MAY 12 10 12 PM '52'. There are two hole-punch marks at the top. No photographs, sketches, or diagrams are present.

judge.reason: Both sides agree on the visual elements of the page: a prominent stamp at the top center, two hole-punch marks, and no photographs or sketches, but Side B adds specific quoted text for two stamps while Side A describes only one stamp generically.
